title: Quantity Surveyor (Electrical)
description:
Job Description

The Quantity Surveyor (Tender – Electrical) plays a key role in supporting the tendering and cost management processes for electrical works within construction projects. The role involves evaluating project requirements, preparing accurate cost estimates, negotiating with suppliers and contractors, and ensuring effective financial control from pre-contract to award stage.

Job Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Budget Preparation

·        Prepare detailed cost estimates and tender budgets for Electrical works in construction, ACMV, and A&A (Alteration & Addition) projects.

·        Analyze material, labour, equipment, and subcontractor costs to ensure accurate pricing.

Tender Review & Construction Plan Analysis

·        Review and interpret electrical drawings, specifications, and construction plans to determine comprehensive project cost requirements.

·        Identify discrepancies, design issues, or cost-impact items and highlight them to the project team.

Cost Optimization & Value Engineering

·        Identify opportunities for cost savings through alternative materials, design adjustments, or value engineering proposals.

·        Recommend solutions that maintain project quality and performance standards.

Tender & Bid Preparation

·        Prepare, compile, and submit tender documents, Bills of Quantities (BOQ), and competitive bid proposals.

·        Source, evaluate, and compare quotations from suppliers and subcontractors.

Contract Negotiation

·        Negotiate contract terms, pricing, and delivery conditions with suppliers and subcontractors to achieve cost-effective outcomes.

·        Ensure compliance with project budget, scope, and technical requirements.

Cost Review & Financial Monitoring

·        Assist in tracking tender costs and prepare cost comparison reports for management review.

·        Highlight cost variations, risks, and financial considerations to support decision-making.

Site Evaluation (Pre-Tender)

·        Conduct site visits when necessary to assess site conditions, access, and constructability issues that may affect pricing.

Dispute & Clarification Management

·        Address queries, clarifications, and discrepancies related to tender pricing, BOQ items, or contractual terms.

·        Support resolution of cost-related claims or disputes when required.

Client & Internal Coordination

·        Provide cost-related advice to clients, project managers, and engineers.

·        Collaborate closely with internal departments (Engineering, Procurement, Project Team) to ensure alignment on tender requirements.

Job Requirements

·        Minimum 2 years of relevant working experience in Quantity Surveying, preferably in Electrical or MEP works.

·        Diploma in Engineering, Quantity Surveying, or related field.

·        Strong analytical and numerical skills with high attention to detail and accuracy.

·        Proficient in MS Office, cost estimation software, and project management tools.

·        Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

·        Able to work independently and collaboratively with cross-functional teams.

·        Good negotiation skills with experience in dealing with contractors and suppliers.

·        Understanding of risk management and contract administration.

·        Familiarity with construction industry regulations, standards, and tender procedures.

postedCompany.description:
DLM Pte Ltd, formerly known as Double Mechanical Pte Ltd, was established in 1984. We specialize in design and installation works for:


- Air Conditioning & Mechanical Ventilation System

- High Voltage and Low Voltage Electrical System

- Extra Low Voltage Systems and Security Systems

- Smoke Control and Fire Protection System

- Plumbing and Sanitation


DLM is ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, and BizSafe star certified. An affiliate to DLE M&E Pte Ltd, DLM is registered as a Qualified Mechanical & Electrical Contractor and BCA licensed with specialist work heads:


CR 06 Interior Decorating & Finishing Works L1
CR 07 Cable / Pipe Laying and Road Reinstatement L1
CW 01 General Building C3
ME 01 Air-Conditioning, Refrigeration & Ventilation Works L6
ME 02 Building Automation, Industrial & Process Control Systems L2
ME 05 Electrical Engineering L6
ME 06 Fire Prevention & Protection Systems L2
ME 15 Integrated Building Services L6
Licensed Builder – General Builder Class 1


Creating a strong family culture, we believe that every employee matters and in treating all our employees with respect. We value, care, and recognise our employees for their efforts and contribution to the company. We also believe in continuously developing our employees in multiple skills, enabling them to perform well in various competencies.


DLM Pte Ltd is an Equal Opportunity Employers. We have signed the Employer’s Pledge of Fair Employment Practices with TAFEP. DLM is also accredited to Progressive Wage (PW) Mark, a scheme that recognizes companies that pay lower-wage workers progressive wages.


Join our diversing team today!
